title: hydnocarpus microcarpus
intro: Hydnocarpus microcarpus, also known as the Malabar mallow or Malabar nut, is a plant species native to the Western Ghats of India and other parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which are rich in mucilage and have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hydnocarpus microcarpus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support respiratory health, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. In traditional medicine, the seeds are often used to prepare herbal decoctions, teas, and infusions, and can also be consumed as a powder or capsule.
